---
dataset-title: "Investigating the Relationship Between State-level Minimum Wage Preemption and Health Outcomes"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../project_dataset_style.css">

<div class="dataset-container">
    <!-- Header Section -->
    <header class="dataset-header">
        <p class="header-tagline">Project Dataset</p>
        <h2 class="header-title"> {{< meta dataset-title >}}</h2>
        <div class="header-buttons">  
            <!-- This is the link for downloading the data -->
            <a href="https://osf.io/bfj2m/overview?view_only=ceb536ed5e4e411db4c8c649afaa9951" class="btn btn-download" target="_blank">
              <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right icon"></i> Download Full Dataset from OSF
            </a>
            
            <!-- Update the reference link to the project description -->
            <a href="../projects/project_WDC.html" class="btn btn-project">
                <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill icon"></i> View Project Page
            </a>
            
            <!-- Update the reference link to the class project -->
            <a href="../classplan/class_WDC.html" class="btn btn-classplan">
                <i class="bi bi-book-half icon"></i> View the Class Plan
            </a> 
            
        </div>
    </header>
</div>
```

::: content-card
## About the Data

The files are written in .XPT (SAS transport file) format. To see the data, please click the "Download Full Dataset" button.
:::
